message:
test(core): expand distributed.rs with 50+ unit tests for auth, identity, and security types

Comprehensive inline test coverage for all non-feature-gated public functions
and types in the distributed security module. These tests exercise pure
functions that previously had no direct unit test coverage, relying only
on integration tests for validation.

Test groups added:
- normalize_identity (5 tests): trimming, lowercasing, empty input, mixed case,
  whitespace-only strings.
- constant_time_eq (6 tests): equal strings, different strings, different lengths,
  empty strings, one-empty cases, single-char differences.
- TokenParts::parse (5 tests): identity:secret split, bare secret, empty identity,
  empty secret, multiple colons.
- validate_token (9 tests): no-auth-required (mTLS mode), missing token (both
  directions), matching/wrong bare secrets, identity match/mismatch,
  case-insensitive identity normalization, client-identity cross-check.
- DistributedSecurityError::code (1 test): stability of all 9 error code strings.
- DistributedSecurityError traits (4 tests): Display output, Clone+Eq, Debug format,
  inequality across variants.
- configured_token_source_kind (6 tests): inline, env, file, none-when-nothing-set,
  none-when-ambiguous (multiple sources), ignores whitespace-only inline token.
- DistributedTokenSourceKind traits (1 test): Debug, Clone, Copy, Eq.
- resolve_expected_token (5 tests): inline token resolution, no-auth-returns-None,
  missing all sources, whitespace-only inline treated as missing, env var missing,
  file not found.
- DistributedTlsError Display (1 test): all 9 TLS error variants produce expected
  substring in Display output.
- DistributedCredentialError Display (1 test): TokenMissing, TokenAmbiguous,
  TokenEmpty, TokenEnvMissing produce expected substrings.
- ReadinessItem/ReadinessReport (3 tests): equality, inequality, Debug format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
